colors_background_2.info: Used for Footer, Steps, Interactive section, Testimonials, Search modal input and light blocks on pages.

colors_background_5.label: Dark 2

colors_background_overlay.label: Overlay
colors_background_overlay.info: Used for Interactive section, Product slider, Collection page, Artcile page and Fullscreen aside promo block.

colors_accent.label: Accent color
colors_accent.info: Used for links text decoration, menu icons.

badge_custom_show.info: Need to add a metafield "custom.badges" with type "Single line text" in Shopify admin. [About metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields)

custom_colors.label: Custom colors
custom_colors.info: Like "Red: #ff0000". Each color must be in its own line. You can also use CSS Gradient. For color swatches type "Custom".

favicon.info: Will be scaled down to 32 x 32px

column_per_row.info: This option works only on desktops

header_overlay.info: Only for the first section on the page when Layout Overlay and Size Full Screen settings are enabled.

show_image.info: For best results, use an image with a 2:3 aspect ratio.

manual-selector.info: If the html element has buttons or links inside, then clicking on them will not work.

overlay-close.info: Checking this will cause popup to close when user clicks on overlay

esc-close.label: Press ESC to close
esc-close.info: Checking this will cause popup to close when user presses ESC key

f4-close.label: Press F4 to close
f4-close.info: Checking this will cause popup to close when user presses F4 key

heading.default: Here can be your main title

image_before.info: Both pictures must be added in order for the comparison to appear.

text.default: A quick look at popular products customers love.

heading.info: A heading is required to display the menu.

text.default: This section can showcase a quick summary of what your store offers, such as premium products, customer service, or brand values.

newsletter_text.label: Description
newsletter_text.default: By subscribing, you agree to our terms & conditions.

paragraph.content: When customers subscribe to emails, customer accounts are created. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/customers)

header__2.info: To display your social media accounts, link them in your theme settings.

header__4.info: To add a country/region, go to your [payment settings.](/admin/settings/payments)

header__6.info: To add a language, go to your [language settings.](/admin/settings/languages)

header__8.info: To add store policies, go to your [policy settings](/admin/settings/legal).

header__9.info: To allow customers to follow your store on the Shop app from your storefront, Shop Pay must be enabled. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/follow-on-shop)

logo_2.label: Logo image 2
logo_2.info: Used for sections with header overlay, Login/Create account pages, and in the Dark mode.

enable_search.label: Enable search
enable_search.info: If this option is disabled, settings below will not work.

enable_account_modal_component.label: Enable account modal component
enable_account_modal_component.info: If disabled, the account button redirects to login or account page.

account_info.content: The account button is shown when "Show sign-in links" is enabled in Store settings > Customer accounts.

trigger.label: Trigger
trigger.info: Write the exact name of the link with the submenu. For more information, visit [the documentation page.](https://apparentcollective.com/help-center/documentation/berlin)

overwrite-image.info: When loading an image, the collection's based image is replaced

mega_menu_trigger.label: Trigger
mega_menu_trigger.info: Write the exact name of the menu link. For more information, visit [the documentation page.](https://getshopfront.com/documentation-page)

heading.label: Main menu heading
heading.info: Show if you have added more than one menu

overlay.info: Only works for section layout is Fullscreen

paragraph.content: To change collection descriptions or collection images, [edit your collections.](/admin/collections)

image_products.label: Image for "Products" page
image_products.info: Image for automatically generated page with all products.

show_collection_image.label: Show collection image
show_collection_image.info: For best results, use an image with a 16:9 aspect ratio.

products_per_page.label: Products per page
products_per_page.info: For a better display of the list of products with the option "Enable large product card" enabled, it is recommended to select 7, 11, 15, 19, 23.

filter_layout.label: Filter layout
filter_layout.info: Drawer keeps filters in a slide-out panel. Vertical shows filters in a left column beside products on large screens; small screens still use the drawer.

collection_individual.label: Collection with collection image
collection_individual.info: You can select a collection and assign it a separate featured image. For example, Sale collection.

swatch_size.label: Swatch size
swatch_size.info: This option works when the Color Swatches type is set to "Standard" and the Picker type is set to "Pills".

enable_linked_products.label: Enable linked products
enable_linked_products.info: To enable this functionality, create a product metafield named "Linked products" (custom.linked_products) configured as a "List" with "Product" value.

linked_products_paragraph__1.content: Linked products allows displaying linked products as separate options, each leading to its own product page.

linked_products_paragraph__2.content: By default, linked product images are displayed. Alternatively, each product must have either a "Linked product color" metafield (custom.linked_product_color) storing a color value, or a "Linked product option" metafield (custom.linked_product_option) storing an option value. Both fields should be configured as "One" with a "Single line text" value.

linked_products_paragraph__3.content: The "Linked product color" metafield takes priority over "Linked product option". You can use any valid CSS color (e.g., #FF0000 or red).

show_dynamic_checkout.label: Show dynamic checkout buttons
show_dynamic_checkout.info: Using the payment methods available on your store, customers see their preferred option, like PayPal or Apple Pay. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/using-themes/change-the-layout/dynamic-checkout)

show_gift_card_recipient.label: Show recipient information form for gift card products
show_gift_card_recipient.info: Gift card products can optionally be sent direct to a recipient along with a personal message. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/add-gift-card-recipient-fields)

text.label: Text
text.default: Here can be a brief but clear response to the question, giving customers a quick answer without unnecessary details.

paragraph.content: To select complementary products, add the Search & Discovery app. [Learn more](https:\/\/shopify.dev\/themes\/product-merchandising\/recommendations)

custom_liquid.label: Custom liquid
custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.

image_collage.label: Desktop layout
image_collage.info: Media is automatically optimized for mobile.

header.info: This option only works if enabled option share.

heading.default: Here’s a common question about your product or service.

description.default: This section allows you to give an in-depth explanation, including step-by-step guidance, specific product details, or policy clarifications, ensuring customers get a complete answer to their question without confusion.

default_open.label: Default open
default_open.info: If enabled, the element is open by default

newsletter_text.label: Description
newsletter_text.default: By subscribing, you agree to our terms & conditions.

paragraph.content: When customers subscribe to emails, customer accounts are created. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/customers)

page.label: Page
page.info: Note that adding a contact page will not display the contact form. The contact form is a separate section.

product_list.label: Products
product_list.info: The product list takes priority over the collection.

text_about_products.content: If no products or collection are selected, all products in the store will be available for the section.

text_about_dynamic.content: If there are more than 50 products in the store or selected collection, products will be dynamically loaded from the collection page. The "Product card options" settings will be unavailable and will follow the settings in the "Product grid" section on the collection page. Additionally, the "Products amount" setting cannot exceed the value set in the "Product grid" section on the collection page.

sort.label: Sort products by:
sort.info: "Featured" and "Best selling" do not work when products are selected using the "Products" setting.

paragraph__1.content: Dynamic recommendations use order and product information to change and improve over time. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/themes/development/recommended-products)

heading.label: Subheading
heading.default: This is where a tagline goes

text.label: Description
text.default: Here can be a detailed paragraph that expands on the heading, providing insights, background information, or key details.
This is where you can tell a quick story, highlight a collection, or introduce an event, making your visuals more impactful.

text_information.label: Additional information
text_information.default: This is where you can tell a quick story, highlight a collection, or introduce an event, making your visuals more impactful.

button_style.label: Button style
button_style.info: The inverse option is for the overlay image type

height.label: Aspect ratio
height.info: "Adapt to video" only works for Shopify-hosted video

paragraph.content: Shows when no Shopify-hosted video is selected.

video_muted.label: Mute video
video_muted.info: If autoplay is enabled, the sound of the video will be muted.

description.label: Video alt text
description.info: Describe the video to make it accessible for customers using screen readers.

text.label: Description
text.default: Here, you can provide a short description of this column’s focus — whether it’s a product, service, value, or promotion

collection.info: When a collection is selected, the chosen products are replaced, and the priority is given to the collection.

text.default: Here can be a brief overview of the product selection, allowing customers to browse multiple items in one place.

product_slide.name: Product slide
product_slide.info: When loading an image, the collection's based image is replaced

image.label: Image
image.info: For best results, use an image with a 16:9 aspect ratio. Only on desktop devices.
